name: Patient 42
history: Recurrent grad school dreams about being unprepared for thesis defense. Father described as having high expectations.
intermediate_belief: Any criticism proves I'm not good enough.
intermediate_belief_depression: I'll never meet the high standards set for me.
situation: Receiving criticism during a work performance review.
auto_thought: "Here it comes. I knew I wasn't cutting it. My father was right."
behavior: Nods silently, doesn't ask clarifying questions, leaves review and ruminates for hours.
